HIST - History

HIST437 Modern France from Napoleon to DeGaulle (3 Credits) The changing political and cultural values of French society in response to recurrent crises throughout the 19th and 20th centuries. Students should have had some previous survey of either Western civilization or European history.

HIST453 Diplomatic History of the United States from 1914 (3 Credits) American foreign relations in the 20th century. World War I, the Great Depression, World War II, the Cold War, the Korean War, and Vietnam. A continuation of HIST452.
